parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.id AS user_id,
  u.display_name,
  (
    SELECT json_agg(json_build_object(
      'course', c.title,
      'course_code', c.code,
      'enrolled_at', e.enrolled_at,
      'completed_at', e.completed_at,
      'total_modules', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modules WHERE course_id = c.id),
      'completed_modules', (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM progress p
        JOIN modules m ON m.id = p.module_id
        WHERE p.user_id = u.id AND m.course_id = c.id
      ),
      'current_module', (SELECT title FROM modules WHERE id = e.current_module_id)
    ))
    FROM enrolments e
    JOIN courses c ON c.id = e.course_id
    WHERE e.user_id = u.id
  ) AS enrolments,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certificates WHERE user_id = u.id
  ) AS certificates_earned
FROM users u
WHERE u.slack_user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}';

body.text: No account found. Use `/onboard` to get set up, or `/enroll <course-code>` to start a course.

parameters.text:
=You are the Progress Tracker for the RWR Group LMS.

Learner: {{ $json.display_name || $('When Called by Supervisor').item.json.user_name }}
Certificates earned: {{ $json.certificates_earned }}
Enrolments: {{ JSON.stringify($json.enrolments) }}

Create a concise, motivating progress summary using Slack mrkdwn formatting.
For each course, show:
- Course name
- Progress bar using emoji blocks (e.g. 🟩🟩🟩⬜⬜ for 60%)
- Completed / Total modules
- Status: In Progress / Completed
- Current module name (if in progress)

End with a brief motivational message referencing their overall achievement.
Keep total response under 1200 characters.

options.systemMessage: You are a motivating progress coach. Celebrate wins and encourage continued learning.

elements.text: 🏆 *{{ $('Get Full Progress').item.json.certificates_earned }} certificate(s) earned* · Use `/cert` to claim yours
